zh.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh.Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾吉爾林 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fairfax於大約1409年出生在英國越可爾吉爾林 卡素時，他的父親Sir Richard Fairfax37歲，母親Eustacia Carthorpe30歲。他於大約1446年與Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge在英國越可爾桑頓 布里奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1453年9月17日之前在英國越可爾維瑟比。

zh-hans.Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇
zh-hans.Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾吉爾林 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fairfax于大约1409年出生在英国越可爾吉爾林 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Richard Fairfax37岁，母亲Eustacia Carthorpe30岁。他于大约1446年与Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge在英国越可爾桑頓 布里奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1453年9月17日之前在英国越可爾維瑟比。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fairfax was born about 1409, in Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Richard Fairfax, was 37 and his mother, Eustacia Carthorpe, was 30. He married Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge about 1446, in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 17 September 1453, in Wetherby, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fairfax est né environ 1409, à Gilling Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Fairfax, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Eustacia Carthorpe, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge environ 1446, à Thornton Bridge, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 17 septembre 1453, à Wetherby, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fairfax um 1409 in Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Fairfax 37 und seine Mutter Eustacia Carthorpe 30. Er hat um 1446 in Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 17. September 1453 in Wetherby, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax è nato il circa 1409 nel Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Fairfax, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Eustacia Carthorpe, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge circa 1446, nel Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 17 settembre 1453, nel Wetherby, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Walton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアワルトン
ja.Gilling, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアギリング

ja.Wetherby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウエスエルビー
ja.lifeSummary: William Fairfaxが約1409年にイギリスヨークシュアイアギリング カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Fairfaxは37歳，母Eustacia Carthorpeは30歳であった。約1446年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルントン ブリッジでKatherine Neville I of Thornton Bridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1453年9月17日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスエルビーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Fairfax(이)가 대략 1409년 영국 요르크실르 길링 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Fairfax(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustacia Carthorpe(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 요르크실르 토른턴 브리지에서 Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 9월 17일 이전 영국 요르크실르 w더비에서 사망했다.

mn.Abt 1409–Bef 17 September 1453: ойролцоогоор 1409 он–1453 оны Есдүгээр сарын 17–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax nasceu aproximadamente 1409, em Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Fairfax, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Eustacia Carthorpe, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge aproximadamente 1446, em Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 17 de setembro de 1453, em Wetherby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fairfax родился около 1409 г. в местности джиллинг кастл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Fairfax было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustacia Carthorpe, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge около 1446 г. в местности таурнтон бридж, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 17 сентябрь 1453 г. в местности ветирби, еркшир, Англия.

sm.Abt 1409–Bef 17 September 1453: e tusa o le 1409–a'e le'I oo le 17 Setema 1453

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fairfax nació aproximadamente 1409, en Gilling Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Fairfax, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Eustacia Carthorpe, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Katherine Neville I of Thornton Bridge aproximadamente 1446, en Thornton Bridge, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 17 de septiembre de 1453, en Wetherby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
